overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Hogwarts Legacy depicting the Gryffindor common room. The stationary camera captures students in wizard robes gathering by a stone fireplace, with warm firelight illuminating red tapestries and Gothic wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

events.description: student in wizard robes enters from the archway and approaches the red couch

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the common room fireplace area

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the red velvet couch near the fireplace
student walking from the background archway toward the couch

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and lion statue on mantel
red wall covered with hanging tapestries and banners
plush red couch with wooden frame
tall floor lamp with glowing shade
stone archway leading to other parts of the common room
framed landscape painting above the armchair
green velvet armchair with wooden side table

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the Gryffindor common room with a student seated on the red couch by the fireplace. The room features Gothic architecture with wooden beams, red tapestries, and warm firelight. A second student enters from the background archway and approaches the couch.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: watching the two students sitting together by the fireplace in quiet interaction

notable_agents.action: two students in wizard robes sitting together on the red couch

segments.scene_description: Both students are now seated on the couch together, facing the warm glow of the stone fireplace. The scene remains stable with the two figures sitting in the firelit room surrounded by the common room's Gothic furnishings and red decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

events.description: one student stands up from the couch and walks away toward the background
student walks past the camera in the foreground, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: observing as one student exits and another passes close to the camera

notable_agents.action: student remaining seated alone on the red couch
student walking past the camera in the foreground, temporarily occluding the view

segments.scene_description: One student stands and exits the seating area, leaving the other alone on the couch. Shortly after, another student walks past the camera in the foreground, creating a brief occlusion before the view clears to show the remaining student.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

events.description: student walks from the left side of the room toward the fireplace area

agents.ego_description: watching the remaining student on the couch as another walks through the background

notable_agents.action: student sitting alone on the red couch facing the fireplace
student in wizard robes walking from left to right across the room toward the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The scene settles with one student remaining on the couch as another student walks through the background from left to right, passing near the fireplace. The warm firelight continues to illuminate the Gothic common room interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a quiet moment of social transition within the warm, Gothic atmosphere of the Gryffindor common room. It begins with a single student seated on a red couch by the stone fireplace, as another student enters through a background archway to join them. As the two figures settle together in the glow of the firelight, the scene remains still, emphasizing the surrounding red tapestries and wooden beams. The composition then shifts as one student stands and departs, followed by another student walking across the foreground to briefly occlude the view. Finally, the camera settles on the remaining student on the couch while a final figure crosses the background from left to right, leaving the room in a state of calm, flickering illumination.
